---
title: D. Configure
---

Set up your `.env`, mount your data directory with `make mount`, and set the
`config.yaml` salt.

::: {.callout-note}
## Coming soon
This page is part of the manual's skeleton. Its content is being written in
[issue #8](https://github.com/JeroenUMC/bp-sweden-web/issues/8).
:::
